candidates.why: Separate operating-expense-level D&A summary row, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of revenues and appears outside the selected direct-cost bucket.
Component of the D&A summary row; not COGS-specific and should not be chosen over the summary absent clear COGS linkage.
Component of the D&A summary row; not COGS-specific and should not be chosen over the summary absent clear COGS linkage.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost-of-revenues D&A row is shown. The visible D&A lines appear as separate operating-expense rows below the selected cost rows and above total operating expenses, with no indication they belong specifically to COGS. To avoid unsupported allocation and double counting, do not add any row to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: Explicit operating-level D&A summary row presented separately from the selected XSGA component rows (Other operating expenses, Payroll expenses, Research and Development Expense). Since it sits alongside those components rather than clearly inside them, it should be added separately. Prefer this summary row over underlying D&A components.
Likely component of the D&A summary row and therefore should not be selected when the summary row is available.
Likely component of the D&A summary row and therefore should not be selected when the summary row is available.

variables.notes: Manually Changed. The statement shows a separate 'Depreciation and amortization' line at the same operating level as other expense components and before total operating expenses, so it appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket and should be added separately. Component rows such as 'Amortization of intangible assets' and 'Depreciation of tangible assets' roll into the summary and are excluded to avoid double counting. No separate R&D-specific amortization row is present.
